response.justification: Solid senior full-stack engineer with ~14 years of varied experience across web, mobile, embedded, and some recent AI-agent infrastructure exposure at re:cinq. However, the role is a Director-level IC Principal Engineer position requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategy leadership at scale — the resume shows no evidence of principal-level scope, AI thought leadership, recognized products, or experience advising strategic customers on AI adoption. Title and recent AI work are too junior relative to the bar.
strengths: Broad ~14-year polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and infra
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong craftsmanship signals: TDD, CI/CD, open-source founder of GISCollective, public talks/workshops
concerns: Current title is Staff/Senior, not Principal — lacks Director-level IC scope or org-wide influence
No recognized AI expertise, published AI products/platforms, or advanced AI-related degree
No demonstrated experience advising strategic customers/partners on cloud and AI adoption

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level Principal IC bar
Recent AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work
